ddls:
CREATE TABLE "containers" (
  "container_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each container */,
  "receptacle_model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the receptacle */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the container was assigned to an address */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the container's information was last updated */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group managing the container */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address where the container is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the container is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the container is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code where the container is located */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the container is located */,
  "dpw_division" INTEGER /* DPW division responsible for the container */,
  "council_district" INTEGER /* Council district where the container is located */,
  "ward" INTEGER /* Ward where the container is located */,
  "fire_zone" TEXT /* Fire zone where the container is located */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate for the container's location */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate for the container's location */,
  "container_status" TEXT /* Current status of the container (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date and time when the next maintenance is due */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the container is locked */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the container is assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("container_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_containers_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_containers_fire_zone FOREIGN KEY ("fire_zone") REFERENCES fire_zones ("fire_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_containers_council_district FOREIGN KEY ("council_district") REFERENCES council_districts ("council_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_containers_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_containers_dpw_division FOREIGN KEY ("dpw_division") REFERENCES dpw_divisions ("dpw_division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_containers_ward FOREIGN KEY ("ward") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_containers_receptacle_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("receptacle_model_id") REFERENCES receptacle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receptacle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receptacle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the receptacle model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the receptacle model */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the receptacle model (in gallons or liters) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to manufacture the receptacle */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months or years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group or division */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group or division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group or division */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the group or division */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the group or division */,
  "supervisor_name" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor */,
  "supervisor_email" TEXT /* Email of the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood of the location */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate for the location */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate for the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., residential, commercial, public) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is currently active */,
  "last_inspected_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dpw_divisions" (
  "dpw_division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DPW division */,
  "dpw_division_name" TEXT /* Name of the DPW division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DPW division */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the DPW division */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the DPW division */,
  "supervisor_name" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor */,
  "supervisor_email" TEXT /* Email of the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dpw_division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "council_districts" (
  "council_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each council district */,
  "council_district_name" TEXT /* Name of the council district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the council district */,
  "council_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the council member */,
  "council_member_email" TEXT /* Email of the council member */,
  "council_member_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the council member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("council_district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ward */,
  "ward_supervisor_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward supervisor */,
  "ward_supervisor_email" TEXT /* Email of the ward supervisor */,
  "ward_supervisor_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the ward supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_zones" (
  "fire_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire zone */,
  "fire_zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the fire zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fire zone */,
  "fire_chief_name" TEXT /* Name of the fire chief */,
  "fire_chief_email" TEXT /* Email of the fire chief */,
  "fire_chief_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the fire chief */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fire_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "container_id" INTEGER /* ID of the container that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., repair, inspection, replacement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or team who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the maintenance activity is completed */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date and time when the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_container_id FOREIGN KEY ("container_id") REFERENCES containers ("container_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, technician, admin) */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)
